title: rubus tereticaulis var. sublanatus
intro: Rubus tereticaulis var. sublanatus, also known as the Japanese bramble, is a variety of the bramble plant species native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. The medicinal properties of Rubus tereticaulis var. sublanatus lie in its high concentration of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and anthocyanins, which possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide protection against certain types of cancer. Rubus tereticaulis var. sublanatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
